list.name: pair
list.label: Pair
list.definition: SELECT id as __value, canonical as __text FROM pairs WHERE is_enabled = true ORDER BY canonical

options.content: Opportunities appear when the detection loop identifies CEX/DEX price spreads exceeding configured thresholds. Ensure data collection (Phase 1) is running and detection (Phase 2) is enabled.

**TIMING NOTE**: This dashboard shows BOTH detection-time and execution-time metrics:

- **DETECTION TIME** = When spread first exceeded threshold (`detected_at`, `spread_bps` from CEX/DEX delta)
- **EXECUTION TIME** = When trade was evaluated/submitted (`estimated_profit_usd` from quoter with fresh prices)

Typically 100-2000ms lag between detection and execution. See 'Prediction Accuracy' dashboard for detailed comparison.

targets.rawSql: SELECT date_trunc('hour', detected_at) as time, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50)) GROUP BY time ORDER BY time

SELECT status as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50)) GROUP BY status ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT COALESCE(skip_reason, 'no_reason') as metric, COUNT(*) as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50)) AND status = 'skipped' GROUP BY skip_reason ORDER BY value DESC

SELECT p.canonical as pair, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities o JOIN pairs p ON p.id = o.pair_id WHERE o.detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR o.pair_id = ${pair}) AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR o.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR o.strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND o.estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 50)) GROUP BY p.canonical ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT chain::text, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (${pair} = 0 OR pair_id = ${pair}) AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50)) GROUP BY chain ORDER BY count DESC
SELECT spread_bps FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') LIMIT 1000

SELECT unnest(reason_codes) as reason, COUNT(*) as count FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND reason_codes IS NOT NULL GROUP BY reason ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 20

SELECT o.detected_at, p.canonical as pair, o.chain::text as chain, o.spread_bps as detect_spread_bps, o.direction, o.status, o.skip_reason, o.estimated_profit_usd as exec_est_profit, o.estimated_gas_usd as exec_est_gas FROM opportunities o JOIN pairs p ON p.id = o.pair_id WHERE o.detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND (COALESCE(NULLIF('${pair}', ''), '0') = '0' OR o.pair_id::text = '${pair}') AND ('${chain}' = 'all' OR o.chain::text = '${chain}') AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR o.strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND o.estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND o.estimated_profit_usd > 50)) ORDER BY o.detected_at DESC LIMIT 500

panels.title: Total Opportunities
panels.description: Number of opportunities detected in the selected time range

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50))

panels.title: DETECT TIME: Avg Spread (abs)
panels.description: Average absolute spread in bps at the moment of opportunity detection

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(ABS(spread_bps)) as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50))

panels.title: EXEC TIME: Avg Estimated Profit
panels.description: Average estimated profit from quoter evaluation at execution time

targets.rawSql: SELECT AVG(estimated_profit_usd) as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND estimated_profit_usd IS NOT NULL AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50))

panels.title: Skip Rate
panels.description: Percentage of opportunities skipped due to filters or unprofitability

targets.rawSql: SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) > 0 THEN ROUND(100.0 * SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'skipped' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / COUNT(*), 1) ELSE 0 END as value FROM opportunities WHERE detected_at BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo() AND ('${strategy}' = 'all' OR strategy = '${strategy}') AND ('${pnl_filter}' = 'all' OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'profitable' AND estimated_profit_usd > 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'unprofitable' AND estimated_profit_usd < 0) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt1' AND estimated_profit_usd > 1) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt5' AND estimated_profit_usd > 5) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt10' AND estimated_profit_usd > 10) OR ('${pnl_filter}' = 'gt50' AND estimated_profit_usd > 50))
